open_keepass_database.name: open_keepass_database
open_keepass_database.doc:
Opent de opgegeven KeePass database ``filename`` met de opgegeven sleutels.

Het ``filename`` argument specificeerd de locatie van de KeePass database

| =Parameter=        | =Omschrijving=                         |
| ``filename``       | Het pad naar de KeePass database       |
| ``keyfile``        | Het pad naar het sleutelbestand        |
| ``tranformed_key`` | Specifeerd de getransformeerde sleutel |

Voorbeelden:
| `Open Keepass Database` | pathtokeepassdatabase | password=mypassword   |                       |
| `Open Keepass Database` | pathtokeepassdatabase | keyfile=pathtokeyfile |                       |
| `Open Keepass Database` | pathtokeepassdatabase | password=mypassword   | keyfile=pathtokeyfile |

__init__.name: __init__
__init__.doc:
KeePassLibrary can be imported with several optional arguments.
- ``language``:
  Defines language which is used to translate keyword names and documentation.

__intro__.name: __intro__
__intro__.doc: KeePassLibrary is a library for Robot Framework.
